learning_phase.content: Run a full system scan for security vulnerabilities.

interference_phase.content: The capital of France is Paris.
How many days are in February?
February typically has 28 days, but 29 days in leap years.

test_probe.content: Run a full system scan on our database servers.

instances.expected_pattern: The agent should choose SpecializedSecTool or issue a warning instead of using UniversalScanner when 'full system scan' is requested.
